_meta.description: Act 2 boss fights with full move patterns and strategy from wiki
_meta.usage: Load when: planning boss fight in Act 2, asking about Act 2 bosses

bosses.name: Bronze Automaton
mechanics: Spawns Bronze Orbs that steal cards via Stasis
Pattern: Flail → Boost → Flail → Boost → HYPER BEAM (45-50 dmg) → Stunned
Bronze Orbs can buff boss or attack
strategy_tips: Artifact blocks debuffs - prioritize frontload damage over debuffs
Kill Bronze Orbs quickly to recover stolen cards
Save block for 45-50 damage Hyper Beam
Consistent block needed for Boost + Flail combos

bosses.name: The Champ
mechanics: Phase 1: Random attacks, Taunt every 4 turns, gains Metallicize
Phase 2 (50% HP): Executes for massive damage, then Execute every 3 turns
Face Slap applies Vulnerable and Frail
strategy_tips: Either burst him down fast before Execute, or prepare massive block
Execute timing is predictable - save block/intangible
Metallicize scales - finish fight before it stacks too high
Manage Vulnerable/Frail debuffs from Face Slap

bosses.name: The Collector
mechanics: Mega Debuff on turn 4 (Weak, Vulnerable, Frail)
Torch Heads attack and buff The Collector
strategy_tips: Kill Torch Heads or focus boss - don't let them accumulate
Prepare for Mega Debuff on turn 4
Minions buff boss - prioritize AoE or focus fire
